tagline: Trusted Pool Service and Repair in Palm Beach

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Andy's
Personal Touch
hero.subheadline: Andy Brody and his family-owned team have earned over 243 five-star reviews by treating every pool like it's their own. Licensed, insured, and personally overseeing every job across Palm Beach County — so you get results, not excuses.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">a Team You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full remodels, Andy and his crew handle it all — with the same care they'd give their own backyard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Debris removal, chemical balancing, filter checks, and equipment inspections — every visit keeps your pool swim-ready and sparkling.

cards.title: Pool Heater & Pump Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair for heaters, pumps, and salt systems from Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair. Most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection that pinpoints problems fast — saving you water, money, and preventing costly structural damage to your pool.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Upgrades
cards.description: Deep filter cleaning and system upgrades to keep your water crystal clear. We recommend only what your pool actually needs.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Diamond Brite, Pebble Tec, Florida Gem finishes and full renovations that make your pool look brand new again.

cards.title: Automation & Lighting
cards.description: Smart automation systems and color-changing LED lighting that modernize your pool, cut energy costs, and add resort-style ambiance.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Text Andy
steps.description: Reach Andy directly at 561-660-6062. Describe your pool needs and get an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within a few hours, not days.

steps.title: We Show Up & Deliver
steps.description: Andy personally handles or oversees every job. Licensed, insured technicians arrive on schedule with the right equipment to get it done right the first time.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right — that's the Palm Beach Pool promise.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Andy
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated — Every Single Job
about.description: For 14 years, Andy Brody has built Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service on a simple idea: treat every customer like family. With 243+ five-star reviews, he personally handles or oversees every job — no subcontractors, no surprises. Fully licensed, fully insured, and authorized to service Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair equipment. From Jupiter to Wellington, Andy's team delivers the kind of quality and care that big companies simply can't match.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Andy Brody personally handles or oversees every single service call — your pool gets expert eyes, not a random technician.

features.title: No Contracts. No Pressure.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any service visit? Andy comes back personally and makes it right — no charge, no questions asked.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent quotes with no pressure. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — we earn your business every visit.

guarantee.headline: Andy's Personal Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, Andy will personally return and redo the work at no charge. No fine print, no runaround — just a family business owner who stakes his reputation on every single job. That's what 14 years and 243+ five-star reviews are built on.

faqs.question: How quickly can Andy start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs or emergencies, Andy offers same-day or next-day response. Just call 561-660-6062 and he'll work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and Andy's team takes care of everything. You'll receive a service update so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What brands do you service?
faqs.answer: Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service is an authorized dealer for Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair. Andy and his team have deep expertise across all three — pumps, heaters, filters, salt systems, and automation.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties. Andy believes in earning your business every single visit — not locking you in.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: Andy's team serves Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, North Palm Beach, West Palm Beach, Royal Palm Beach, Wellington, Palm Beach Island, Juno Beach, Loxahatchee, and Riviera Beach.

testimonials.name: Margaret M.
testimonials.text: He treats us like family. I am often out of town and can rest easy knowing my pool and hot tub are taken care of. Andy is the best.

testimonials.name: Jeffrey M.
testimonials.text: Excellent experience. Andy and his team did a great job and educated me on proper maintenance and settings. Highly recommend Palm Beach Pool.

testimonials.name: Jan D.
testimonials.text: He showed up, took complete ownership of the problem and got our pool looking good again in a short amount of time. Truly professional.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That

contact.subtitle: Call Andy directly or fill out the form for a free, no-pressure quote. No contracts, no commitments — just honest service from a family business that cares.
benefits: Free on-site pool inspection with every quote
